headers.content-security-policy-report-only: default-src 'self' * blob: data:; script-src * about: 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; style-src * 'unsafe-inline'; img-src * data: blob:; media-src * blob: data:; frame-ancestors 'self'; report-uri /report-csp-violation; upgrade-insecure-requests
